title: Neuronal cell-type classification: challenges, opportunities and the path forward
abstract: A comprehensive review of approaches to neuronal cell-type classification, discussing molecular, morphological, electrophysiological, and connectomic methods. Proposes a framework for integrating multiple data modalities to achieve a consensus taxonomy of brain cell types, addressing challenges of defining discrete types from continuous variation.
notes: Landmark review on cell type classification. Co-authored with Joshua Sanes.
